description: Recruiter-pattern question battery for the visitor chatbot. Generic across portfolios — questions are about a portfolio owner whose name/role/employers/etc. are pulled from their ProfileData. Expected answers will differ per owner; the questions themselves are the regression surface. See README.md for usage and how the battery evolved (R8 → R8.4).

questions.q: Tell me about <NAME> — who are they and what do they do?
Are they a backend or frontend engineer?
How many years of experience do they have?
Are they available for new work?
Are they open to remote roles?
What programming languages do they use?
Have they done any AI or ML work?
Tell me about a project where they led something.

questions.outOfScopeNote: Salary is intentionally not surfaced in the corpus; refusal is the correct answer.

questions.q: How long have they been at their current company?
Are they authorized to work in the US?
